This file is heading-less, frontmatter-less prose — the shape of a Hermes
native memories/USER.md that the adapter mirrors verbatim into the sync repo.
It deliberately contains no YAML frontmatter and no `##` section headings, so
memex-core's parseMemoryFile yields zero indexable entries. The content here is
generic on purpose: the real USER.md is the operator's private memory and is not
committed to this public repo. See issue #12 for whether mirrored prose like this
should be surfaced by the memex layer at all.
